'''Swyy'm-Ee''' was a [[Trogodile/Legends|Trogodile]] [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiator]] in [[the Cauldron]] arena on the planet [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]]. Swyy'm-Ee wielded twin [[fi'lang]]s against the other combatants but was later defeated by assassin [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]].

==Biography==
Swyy'm-Ee was a reptilian [[Trogodile/Legends|Trogodile]] from the harsh world of [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]].<ref name="Sticker" /> Shortly after the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Swyy'm-Ee ended up in [[the Cauldron]] arena.<ref name="CW" /> It was the largest gladiatorial pit on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], filled with violent warriors, where war barons and generals sought out the best combatants who would win their wars.<ref name="DBR">{{DB|location|rattatak|Rattatak}}</ref> Therefore, Swyy'm-Ee, like many other gladiators,<ref name="CW" /> entered a deadly free-for-all battle,<ref name="EGD">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref> but it was a rare gladiator indeed who could survive multiple fights there.<ref name="DBR" />

[[File:GladiatorsOnTheCauldron.jpg|280px|left|thumb|Swyy'm-Ee and the other gladiators preparing to attack Asajj Ventress]]
During one battle, the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] attended the match, hoping to find a new [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]] among the fighters. Swyy'm-Ee fought<ref name="CW" /> [[Flalios]]<ref name="Sticker" /> when the [[Dathomirian/Legends|Dathomirian]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] entered the arena and, in a short time, defeated most of the remaining gladiators. The survivors united for a single attack against Ventress, but she used the [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to crush stone debris from the ceiling onto their heads.<ref name="CW" />

==Personality and traits==
Swyy'm-Ee belonged to a predatory reptilian species and fought using their traditional crooked blades called [[fi'lang]].<ref name="Sticker" /> During the fight in the Cauldron, Swyy'm-Ee wore a red dress.<ref name="CW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Swyy'm-Ee<ref name="Sticker" /> first appeared as an unnamed background character in the [[Chapter 6 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|sixth chapter]]<ref name="CW" /> of ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', an animated television micro-series<ref name="Chapter Archive">{{SWArchive|url=clonewars/microseries/chapter/archive.html|text=View ''Clone Wars'' Chapter Archive}}</ref> produced by [[Cartoon Network]] Studios<ref name="Volume One">[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]]</ref> and originally aired on [[November 14]], [[2003]].<ref name="TV">{{TVcom|url=shows/star-wars-clone-wars/chapter-vi-276612|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars - Season 1, Episode 6: Chapter VI}}</ref> The character was later given a name in ''[[Ultimate Sticker Book: Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', a sticker book written by [[Simon Beecroft]] and released in [[2004]].<ref name="DK">{{DK|url=us/9780756607593-ultimate-sticker-book-star-wars-clone-wars|text=Ultimate Sticker Book: Star Wars: Clone Wars|nolive=1}}</ref>

In the episode, the death of the character was depicted twice in a mere few seconds. The first time, Swyy'm-Ee was shown to be crushed by a falling piece of ceiling right after [[Anchor Blue]]. Three seconds later, Swyy'm-Ee suffered the exact same fate once again, right after [[Grunda Dolma]].<ref name="CW" />
